speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: Do they still fly to th’ Roman?

speaker: LIEUTENANT
text: I do not know what witchcraft’s in him, but

speaker: LIEUTENANT
text: Your soldiers use him as the grace ’fore meat,

speaker: LIEUTENANT
text: Their talk at table, and their thanks at end;

speaker: LIEUTENANT
text: And you are dark’ned in this action, sir,

speaker: LIEUTENANT
text: Even by your own.

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: I cannot help it now,

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: Unless by using means I lame the foot

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: Of our design. He bears himself more proudlier,

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: Even to my person, than I thought he would

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: When first I did embrace him. Yet his nature

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: In that’s no changeling, and I must excuse

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: What cannot be amended.

speaker: LIEUTENANT
text: Yet I wish, sir—

speaker: LIEUTENANT
text: I mean for your particular—you had not

speaker: LIEUTENANT
text: Joined in commission with him, but either

speaker: LIEUTENANT
text: Have borne the action of yourself or else

speaker: LIEUTENANT
text: To him had left it solely.

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: I understand thee well, and be thou sure,

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: When he shall come to his account, he knows not

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: What I can urge against him, although it seems,

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: And so he thinks and is no less apparent

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: To th’ vulgar eye, that he bears all things fairly,

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: And shows good husbandry for the Volscian state,

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: Fights dragonlike, and does achieve as soon

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: As draw his sword; yet he hath left undone

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: That which shall break his neck or hazard mine

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: Whene’er we come to our account.

speaker: LIEUTENANT
text: Sir, I beseech you, think you he’ll carry Rome?

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: All places yields to him ere he sits down,

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: And the nobility of Rome are his;

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: The Senators and Patricians love him too.

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: The Tribunes are no soldiers, and their people

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: Will be as rash in the repeal as hasty

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: To expel him thence. I think he’ll be to Rome

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: As is the osprey to the fish, who takes it

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: By sovereignty of nature. First, he was

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: A noble servant to them, but he could not

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: Carry his honors even. Whether ’twas pride,

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: Which out of daily fortune ever taints

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: The happy man; whether defect of judgment,

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: To fail in the disposing of those chances

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: Which he was lord of; or whether nature,

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: Not to be other than one thing, not moving

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: From th’ casque to th’ cushion, but commanding peace

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: Even with the same austerity and garb

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: As he controlled the war; but one of these—

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: As he hath spices of them all—not all,

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: For I dare so far free him—made him feared,

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: So hated, and so banished. But he has a merit

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: To choke it in the utt’rance. So our virtues

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: Lie in th’ interpretation of the time,

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: And power, unto itself most commendable,

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: Hath not a tomb so evident as a chair

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: T’ extol what it hath done.

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: One fire drives out one fire, one nail one nail;

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: Rights by rights falter; strengths by strengths do fail.

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: Come, let’s away. When, Caius, Rome is thine,

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: Thou art poor’st of all; then shortly art thou mine.
